_source: Clinical indication rules for medications that should not appear without a supporting diagnosis, per FDA prescribing information. Curated to the medications in medication_dosage_ranges.json that carry a hard indication requirement. Used by the document pipeline Layer 5 Cross-Reference Agent (e.g. Warfarin without any anticoagulation indication -> flag for clinical review).
_note: icd_prefixes are matched as ICD-10-CM code prefixes across all documents in the referral packet. A match on any prefix satisfies the indication.
